user.title: SL Transport – Choose type
user.description: Select what you want to monitor.

travel_time.title: Travel Time – Configure route
travel_time.description: Enter the names of the origin and destination stops. E.g. Slussen, Odenplan, T-Centralen.

departures.title: Departures – Configure stop
departures.description: Search for a stop by name above, or enter a numeric site ID directly (e.g. 9192 for Slussen). Use the filter fields to narrow down results.

deviations.title: Deviations – Configure
deviations.description: Leave blank for all SL deviations, or search/enter a site ID to filter to a specific stop.

data.site_id: Site ID (optional – leave blank for all SL)
data.name: Name (optional)

site_lookup.title: Stop lookup – Search results
site_lookup.description: Type a stop name to search, then select from the results below.

error.invalid_stop: Stop name must not be empty.
error.invalid_site_id: Site ID must be a number (e.g. 9192 for Slussen).
error.invalid_integer: Value must be a whole number.
error.empty_search: Please enter a stop name to search.
error.no_results: No stops found for that query. Try a different name.

init.title: SL Transport – Options
init.description: Adjust settings for this integration entry.
